metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_915
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors use an antibody specific for PLC B4 in immunoelectron microscopy studies. PLC B4 was detected at the edges of the post-synaptic density in both pre-embedding (Figure 5) and post-embedding (7) studies. In line with a localization to the PSD, in subcellular fractionation, PLC-B4 was detected in the PSD fraction that is also enriched in mGluR1a and GluRa3.

The antibody against PLC B4 is verified by western blot against PLC B4 knockout (Figure 1).. Experimental description: Adult C57BL mice at 2-3 months of age were used in the present
study, with the exception of ICR mice for immunoprecipitation.
